series_metadata.series_description: These records are the Work Papers, which are gathered or prepared to substantiate the content of the examination reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years after date of examination, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
